name: spist-library-management-system
description: Library Management System for Southern Philippines Institute of Science & Technology

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/routes/admin.js && node --check src/routes/auth.js && node --check src/routes/students.js
scripts.smoke: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['server.js','src/routes/admin.js','src/routes/auth.js','src/routes/students.js'].forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error('Missing '+f)}); console.log('Smoke OK');"
